missing_de.lightModeDescription: Light mode is optimal for bright environments

missing_de.exportDataDescription: Export all your clinic data to a portable JSON file. This includes patients, clinical reports, sessions, financial records, and more.

missing_de.departmentScopeDescription: Assign this staff member to specific departments.

missing_de.teamScopeDescription: Assign this staff member to specific teams.

missing_de.addStaffPrompt: Add staff members first to quickly invite them, or enter an email manually below.
missing_de.advancedPermissions: Advanced: Manually grant or revoke permissions
missing_de.pleaseSelectRoleToProceed: Please select a role to proceed.
missing_de.debugModeWarning: Debug Mode Only - This page is only accessible in debug mode
missing_de.debugModeInfo: Debug Mode: This page is only accessible in debug builds
missing_de.aboutMission: Dr. Copilot is a comprehensive clinic management application designed to streamline your practice's operations and empower healthcare professionals with cutting-edge tools. Our mission is to provide the best possible care to patients through innovative technology and seamless workflow integration.
missing_de.featurePatientManagementDesc: Keep track of all your patient records in one secure, centralized location. Manage patient demographics, medical history, and treatment plans with ease.
missing_de.featureAppointmentsDesc: Easily schedule and manage appointments with an integrated calendar system. Set reminders, track attendance, and optimize your clinic's schedule.
missing_de.featureBillingDesc: Simplify your billing process with integrated financial tools. Generate invoices, track payments, manage bills, and monitor revenue streams effortlessly.
missing_de.featureClinicalReportsDesc: Create, manage, and export professional clinical reports. Integrate with Google Drive for seamless document storage and sharing.
missing_de.featureAiAssistantDesc: Leverage advanced AI models (Gemini, GPT, Claude) to assist with documentation, patient insights, and clinical decision support.
missing_de.featureTeamChatDesc: Built-in messaging system for clinic staff, doctors, and admins. Create teams, share updates, and maintain seamless communication.
missing_de.featureFinancialsDesc: Track revenue, expenses, and financial goals with comprehensive analytics. Visualize trends with charts and make data-driven decisions.
missing_de.featureIntegrationsDesc: Seamlessly integrate with Google Drive, Google Calendar, and other cloud services for enhanced productivity and data accessibility.
missing_de.lowStockMessage: The following items are running low: {}
missing_de.lowStockWarning: Warning: {count} items are running low on stock.
missing_de.deleteItemConfirmation: Are you sure you want to delete this item? This action cannot be undone.
missing_de.technologyGemini: Google Gemini AI - Advanced language model
missing_de.technologyGoogleCloud: Google Cloud Services - Drive & Calendar integration
missing_de.pleaseEnterUnit: Please enter a unit (e.g., box, bottle)

errors.default: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.server: Server error. Please try again later.

auth.user_not_found: User not found. Please checks your email or sign up.

missing_de.noTeamMembersFound: You need to be in a team to start messaging
missing_de.createFirstTeam: Create your first team to organize members
missing_de.archiveTeamConfirm: Are you sure you want to archive '{teamName}'? You can unarchive it later.
missing_de.noPermissionCreateTeam: You don't have permission to create teams. Contact your clinic administrator.
missing_de.pleaseSelectAtLeastOneMember: Please select at least one member
missing_de.noTeamsAvailable: No teams available. Create teams first.
missing_de.errorStartingChat: Error starting chat. Please try again.
missing_de.createFirstDepartment: Create your first department to organize staff
missing_de.deleteDepartmentConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete '{name}'?
missing_de.faqInviteStaff: How do I invite staff members?
missing_de.faqInviteStaffAns: Team management is available on Pro and Elite plans. Once upgraded, navigate to the Teams section to invite doctors and staff members.
missing_de.faqFreePlanLimits: What are the limits of the Free plan?
missing_de.faqFreePlanLimitsAns: The Free plan includes 50 patients, 50 monthly sessions, and 5 daily AI interactions. It does not include cloud backup or team features.
missing_de.faqExportData: How can I export my data?
missing_de.faqExportDataAns: Go to Settings → Data & Storage → Export My Data. This feature is available for Pro and Elite subscribers to download a JSON backup.
missing_de.faqSwitchAIAns: Yes! Go to Settings → Model Selection to choose between Gemini, GPT-4, and Claude models based on your preference.
missing_de.faqCreateReport: How do I create a clinical report?
missing_de.faqCreateReportAns: Navigate to the Clinical Reports section, click the '+' button, select a patient, and you can either write manually or use the AI Copilot to generate it.
missing_de.faqManageSubscription: Where can I manage my subscription?
missing_de.faqManageSubscriptionAns: You can upgrade or manage your current plan preferences in Settings → Subscription.
missing_de.faqDataBackupAns: Cloud backup and synchronization across devices are premium features available on the Pro and Elite plans.
